summary: @NVIDIAAI: NVIDIA Metropolis Blueprint for video search and summarization (VSS) 3 is here. Now your coding agent can analyze massiv
whyItMatters: NVIDIA Metropolis Blueprint for video search and summarization (VSS) 3 is here. Now your coding agent can analyze massive live streams and libraries of videos with a simple natural language prompt. Here's what's new: - 16 new agent skills: Search, summarize, alert, report, review clips. All from natural language prompts. - One unified open source repo: Sour…
